item.title: SPIKE: tree-sitter Swift Integration
item.intent: Evaluate swift-tree-sitter package for syntax highlighting of fenced code blocks and measure binary size impact
item.description: Evaluate the swift-tree-sitter (or SwiftTreeSitter) package for integration into the EMEditor package. Build a prototype that highlights 3 languages (Swift, Python, JavaScript). Measure: binary size impact of bundling grammars, parse performance on a 500-line code block, and API ergonomics for incremental updates. Assess build system compatibility with SPM. Blocks FEAT-006 (Syntax Highlighting). Updates architecture decision [A-005].
acceptanceCriteria: Prototype highlights Swift, Python, and JavaScript code blocks
Binary size impact of 3 grammars measured (and extrapolated for 15+)
Parse performance on 500-line code block measured
Architecture decision [A-005] updated based on findings
